task: edu RAG source_url preservation and backfill

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires verification at the user-facing/runtime entrypoint before reporting done.
Code and customer-facing answer changes require real API, DB, service, or production-like evidence.

verification.name: source_url backfill local data files
verification.target: local db and data/edu_research runtime artifacts
verification.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/backfill_edu_evidence_source_urls.py
verification.result: evidence_index.json url_present=1803 still_missing=0; evidence_bank.json url_present=19 still_missing=0

verification.name: safety coach real retrieval simulation
verification.target: local backend API code path and RAG data
verification.command: direct EduVpTrainingSafetyCoachRequest for 'AI가 아이 숙제를 대신 해주는 건 어디까지 막아야 해?'
verification.result: RAG infused answer contained a concrete source URL and source label; rejected candidates include source_url_present diagnostics

verification.name: pytest regression suite
verification.target: tests and backend source_url gates
verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py tests/test_edu_customer_facing_retrieval.py tests/test_edu_evidence_quality.py tests/test_agent_completion_guard.py tests/test_llm_governance_bootstrap.py -q
verification.result: 115 passed, 5 warnings, 12 subtests passed

verification.name: edu frontend production bundle build
verification.target: dist production bundle
verification.command: npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app
verification.result: vite build succeeded; generated dist/assets/index-DPSFv7cK.js and dist/assets/index-DQ_nQAdK.css

verification.name: edu coach deployment regression guard
verification.target: pre-deploy regression guard
verification.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/check_edu_coach_simulation_regression.py
verification.result: guard passed with baseline max_needs_work adversarial=95 corpus=14264; freshness, latency, structured_packet, and auto_reinforcement all ok

verification.name: macmini timeout pilot before default change
verification.target: macmini backend code path and production RAG data
verification.command: EDU_SAFETY_COACH_RAG_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=5 direct EduVpTrainingSafetyCoachRequest for homework question
verification.result: selected_count=3 elapsed_ms=2347 timeout_ms=5000; rag=True; answer_has_source_link=True with Jonathan Haidt WEF source URL

verification.name: macmini production data source_url backfill
verification.target: macmini db and production RAG data files
verification.command: ssh macmini 'cd /Users/juntaepark/projects/harness-platform && .venv/bin/python scripts/backfill_edu_evidence_source_urls.py'
verification.result: evidence_index.json items=20676 url_present=20676 still_missing=0; evidence_bank.json items=44 url_present=44 still_missing=0

verification.name: macmini production default answer check
verification.target: macmini backend service code path and production RAG data
verification.command: direct EduVpTrainingSafetyCoachRequest for homework question on Mac Mini after deploy with default timeout
verification.result: selected_count=3 skip=None elapsed_ms=2320 timeout_ms=5000; rag=True; answer_has_source_link=True; final answer includes Jonathan Haidt WEF link

verification.name: macmini backend service liveness
verification.target: macmini service url
verification.command: curl --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:8000/
verification.result: HTTP 200 returned production frontend HTML

verification.name: markdown leak sanitizer and bold policy regression
verification.target: backend answer finalizer
verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py::EduVpTrainingFlowTests::test_safety_coach_api_answer_removes_malformed_markdown_leaks tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py::EduVpTrainingFlowTests::test_safety_coach_api_answer_keeps_only_decision_boundary_bold_labels tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py::EduVpTrainingFlowTests::test_safety_coach_prepare_answer_strips_broad_markdown_and_keeps_summary_marker -q
verification.result: 3 passed; malformed broad/odd markdown removed while decision-boundary labels remain bold

verification.name: headless chrome markdown rendering check
verification.target: browser DOM rendering fixture
verification.command: Google Chrome --headless --dump-dom file:///tmp/edu_safety_render_check.html
verification.result: raw_marker_visible=false; strong_count=3 for allowed labels only; API answer contains no raw ** markers

verification.name: post-markdown full regression
verification.target: tests, deployment guard, production bundle
verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py tests/test_edu_customer_facing_retrieval.py tests/test_edu_evidence_quality.py tests/test_agent_completion_guard.py tests/test_llm_governance_bootstrap.py -q; .venv/bin/python scripts/check_edu_coach_simulation_regression.py; npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app
verification.result: 120 passed, 5 warnings, 12 subtests passed; deployment regression guard ok; edu-app production build ok with dist/assets/index-C1msxd1J.js

verification.name: conclusion break and semantic bold labels
verification.target: backend formatter and frontend label renderer
verification.command: pytest targeted conclusion-label tests; node fixture with TrainingScreen action-emphasis regex
verification.result: API answer has no ** markers; conclusion starts after a blank line; rendered strong labels include the action sentence, conclusion, and source; importantPointStrong=false

verification.name: rag source placement contract
verification.target: backend answer formatter and tests
verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py::EduVpTrainingFlowTests::test_safety_coach_blends_rag_before_conclusion_and_keeps_link_in_source_only -q
verification.result: RAG source label appears in body as plain text; markdown URL appears only in the final source line after the conclusion

verification.name: frontend action emphasis fixture
verification.target: frontend renderer regex behavior
verification.command: node fixture mirroring renderInlineCoachMarkdown split and emphasis policy
verification.result: strong=[quoted question action sentence, conclusion label, source label]; actionStrong=true; conclusionStrong=true; sourceLabelStrong=true; importantPointStrong=false

verification.name: macmini v20 no-markdown API answer check
verification.target: macmini backend and production RAG data
verification.command: direct EduVpTrainingSafetyCoachRequest for homework question after v20 deploy
verification.result: superseded by v21 because v20 cached answers could remain visible in the UI

verification.name: macmini edu-app bundle rebuild
verification.target: macmini edu-app production bundle
verification.command: PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app
verification.result: vite build succeeded after emphasis fix; generated dist/assets/index-DacvyTij.js

verification.name: macmini post-emphasis backend answer check
verification.target: macmini backend and production RAG data
verification.command: direct EduVpTrainingSafetyCoachRequest for homework question after deploy
verification.result: rag=true; has_source=true; source appears only in the final source line; body_has_markdown_link_before_source=false; markdown_leak=false; summary break present via 간단히 말하면

verification.name: post-emphasis render policy check
verification.target: frontend renderer regex behavior for actual answer text
verification.command: node fixture mirroring renderInlineCoachMarkdown against Mac Mini answer shape
verification.result: strong labels/actions are limited to action sentences plus structure labels; importantPointStrong=false

verification.name: v21 cache bust and source-link sanitizer regression
verification.target: backend formatter, frontend answer version, and tests
verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py tests/test_edu_customer_facing_retrieval.py tests/test_edu_evidence_quality.py tests/test_agent_completion_guard.py tests/test_llm_governance_bootstrap.py -q; npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app
verification.result: 121 passed, 5 warnings, 12 subtests passed; frontend build ok with dist/assets/index-DxygOSe2.js; answer version bumped to 2026-06-28-source-format-v21 so v20 cached answers are ignored; body source markdown links are stripped before '에는'

verification.name: v21 action emphasis fixture
verification.target: frontend renderer regex behavior
verification.command: node fixture mirroring TrainingScreen action emphasis regex
verification.result: quoted action sentence is bold only through '아이가 직접 생각하게 하는 게'; '중요한 점입니다' remains plain; conclusion and source labels remain bold

verification.name: macmini v21 deployed answer check
verification.target: macmini backend code path, production RAG data, and production bundle
verification.command: direct EduVpTrainingSafetyCoachRequest for homework question with answer_version=2026-06-28-source-format-v21 after deploy; PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app; curl http://127.0.0.1:8000/
verification.result: backend_version=2026-06-28-source-format-v21; frontend_version=2026-06-28-source-format-v21; generated dist/assets/index-BW1Y4Fzu.js; HTTP 200; rag=true; has_source=true; body_has_markdown_link_before_source=false; markdown_leak=false; summary_break=true

verification.name: source-citation consistency root cause diagnosis
verification.target: Naver Cafe URL and production DB lineage
verification.command: curl https://cafe.naver.com/dochithink/2314987; DB queries over raw_signals, filtered_signals, refined_outputs for URL and phrase
verification.result: The phrase 'AI가 대신 해주는 것이 아니라...' was not present in the raw Naver Cafe source; it was generated inside refined_outputs.final_body action_now for refined_output_id=8105 and incorrectly attributed to raw source_url

verification.name: source-citation consistency cleanup
verification.target: local RAG artifacts and future builders
verification.command: EMBEDDING_PROVIDER_MODE=ollama scripts/build_edu_evidence_index.py --rebuild; scripts/refresh_edu_evidence_bank.py; scripts/audit_edu_evidence_source_consistency.py --fix; scripts/audit_edu_evidence_source_consistency.py
verification.result: evidence_index rebuilt from source-owned raw text only; title-only cites excluded; final audit rejected=0 with evidence_index count=505, evidence_bank count=39, missing_url=0; unsupported items written to data/edu_research/evidence_source_consistency_dlq.jsonl

verification.name: v22 runtime guard
verification.target: backend safety coach evidence validator and frontend cache version
verification.command: pytest suite, local v22 homework question probe with EMBEDDING_PROVIDER_MODE=ollama
verification.result: answer_version bumped to 2026-06-28-source-format-v22; runtime rejects cite_not_supported_by_source and intent-missing evidence; homework probe had has_fake_phrase=false, has_dochithink=false, and no source when all candidates failed strict validation

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh data/edu_research/evidence_anchors.json harness-os/backend/main.py scripts/build_edu_evidence_index.py scripts/refresh_edu_evidence_bank.py scripts/backfill_edu_evidence_source_urls.py scripts/check_edu_coach_simulation_regression.py; then scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh harness-os/backend/main.py docs/reports/completion_evidence/edu_rag_source_url_backfill_20260628.json; then scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh harness-os/backend/main.py harness-os/edu-app/src/components/TrainingScreen.tsx tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py docs/reports/completion_evidence/edu_rag_source_url_backfill_20260628.json
deploy.result: Mac Mini selective checkout passed origin diff=0 for deployed paths; backend launchd reload succeeded; production RAG data backfill completed; post-emphasis bundle rebuild and HTTP 200 check passed; v21 cache-bust deploy verified
